mapper.sql: COALESCE(st.DI_ID, ds.min_id) AS id, ds.SLNO AS serial_num, ISNULL(CASE WHEN ISNUMERIC(st.DI_VALUE) = 1 THEN CONVERT(INT, st.DI_VALUE) ELSE NULL END, 0) AS status
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM ( SELECT SLNO, MIN(DI_ID) AS min_id FROM DEVICEINFO WHERE NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(SLNO)), '') IS NOT NULL GROUP BY SLNO ) ds OUTER APPLY ( SELECT TOP 1 DI_ID, DI_VALUE FROM DEVICEINFO s WHERE s.SLNO = ds.SLNO AND s.DI_PARAM = 'JAVA_CLOUD_STATUS' ORDER BY s.DI_ID DESC ) st ORDER BY ds.SLNO

SELECT TOP 1
FROM ( SELECT SLNO, MIN(DI_ID) AS min_id FROM DEVICEINFO WHERE NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(SLNO)), '') IS NOT NULL GROUP BY SLNO ) ds OUTER APPLY ( SELECT TOP 1 DI_ID, DI_VALUE FROM DEVICEINFO s WHERE s.SLNO = ds.SLNO AND s.DI_PARAM = 'JAVA_CLOUD_STATUS' ORDER BY s.DI_ID DESC ) st WHERE COALESCE(st.DI_ID, ds.min_id) = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

SELECT TOP 1
FROM ( SELECT SLNO, MIN(DI_ID) AS min_id FROM DEVICEINFO WHERE SLNO = #{serialNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY SLNO ) ds OUTER APPLY ( SELECT TOP 1 DI_ID, DI_VALUE FROM DEVICEINFO s WHERE s.SLNO = ds.SLNO AND s.DI_PARAM = 'JAVA_CLOUD_STATUS' ORDER BY s.DI_ID DESC ) st
mapper.insert: IF EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM DEVICEINFO WHERE SLNO = #{serialNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND DI_PARAM = 'JAVA_CLOUD_STATUS' ) BEGIN UPDATE DEVICEINFO SET DI_VALUE = CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}), DI_MANUAL = 1 WHERE DI_ID = ( SELECT TOP 1 DI_ID FROM DEVICEINFO WHERE SLNO = #{serialNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND DI_PARAM = 'JAVA_CLOUD_STATUS' ORDER BY DI_ID DESC ); END ELSE BEGIN INSERT INTO DEVICEINFO (SLNO, DI_PARAM, DI_VALUE, DI_MANUAL) VALUES ( #{serialNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'JAVA_CLOUD_STATUS', CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}), 1 ); END
INSERT INTO DEVICEINFO (SLNO, DI_PARAM, DI_VALUE, DI_MANUAL) VALUES ( #{serialNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'JAVA_CLOUD_STATUS', CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), ISNULL(#{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, 0)), 1 )
mapper.update: UPDATE DEVICEINFO SET DI_VALUE = CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), ISNULL(#{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, 0)), DI_MANUAL = 1 WHERE DI_ID = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER} AND DI_PARAM = 'JAVA_CLOUD_STATUS'
UPDATE DEVICEINFO SET DI_VALUE = CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), ISNULL(#{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, 0)), DI_MANUAL = 1 WHERE DI_ID = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER} AND DI_PARAM = 'JAVA_CLOUD_STATUS'

DECLARE @slno VARCHAR(20); SELECT TOP 1 @slno = SLNO FROM DEVICEINFO WHERE DI_ID = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER};
IF @slno IS NOT NULL BEGIN IF EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM DEVICEINFO WHERE SLNO = @slno AND DI_PARAM = 'JAVA_CLOUD_STATUS' ) BEGIN UPDATE DEVICEINFO SET DI_VALUE = CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}), DI_MANUAL = 1 WHERE DI_ID = ( SELECT TOP 1 DI_ID FROM DEVICEINFO WHERE SLNO = @slno AND DI_PARAM = 'JAVA_CLOUD_STATUS' ORDER BY DI_ID DESC ); END ELSE BEGIN INSERT INTO DEVICEINFO (SLNO, DI_PARAM, DI_VALUE, DI_MANUAL) VALUES (@slno, 'JAVA_CLOUD_STATUS', CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}), 1); END END
